message:
chore(beads): add pages config validation normalization bug and update last-touched

Add new in-progress issue tracking a bug where pages config validation
lowercases but does not trim whitespace for filters.path_mode and
deployment.target, while runtime parsing trims in path_mode(). This
creates false validation failures for whitespace-padded values and
inconsistent behavior between validate() and to_wizard_state().

- New issue: coding_agent_session_search-24hqn (pages config normalization bug)
- Updated last-touched pointer to track active work

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
